/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -fPIC -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-variable -DOPENCV -std=c++11 -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libdarknetTR.so -o libdarknetTR.so CMakeFiles/darknetTR.dir/demo/demo/darknetTR.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib:/home/alex/Projects/tkDNN-python/cmake-build-debug:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/local/lib libtkDNN.so libkernels.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudadevrt.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so /usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib/libnvinfer.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.4.0 -lyaml-cpp
